title: UTCI-to-DTS
author: Bröde, Peter
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Mapping values of the Universal Thermal Climate Index (UTCI) to Dynamic Thermal Sensation (DTS), cf. Fig. 10 in https://doi.org/10.1007/s00484-011-0454-1 
Tab-delimited ASCII file with the two columns UTCI (in °C) and DTS representing values from the 7-point thermal sensation scale (-3:cold; -2:cool:; -1:slightly cool; 0:neutral; +1:slightly warm; +2:warm; +3:hot) 

 Headers in line 3, first data row in line 4
